commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh 2 Chronicles 29:9 For, lo, our fathers have fallen by the sword, and our sons and our daughters and our wives are in captivity for this. Heaven, and cries for vengeance against you. Though God designed to punish his people, your cruelty will not be excused. (Haydock) The effect of this remonstrance, shows that all the kingdom of Israel was not devoid (Calmet) of feeling and religion. (Haydock) They set a noble example for Christian princes to follow after a victory.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
